heading: What people are saying
subheading: Workshops, lessons, and collaborations our community loves

testimonials.quote: Our team had an absolute blast — the instructors made it so easy for total beginners to jump in. Best office event we've done all year.
testimonials.author: Office Workshop

testimonials.quote: I went from never having touched a tile to confidently playing with points in one session. Patient, fun, and welcoming.
testimonials.author: Private Lesson Student

testimonials.quote: The pop-up they hosted with us drew a huge crowd and amazing content. Easy to work with and great energy.
testimonials.author: Brand Collaboration
